title: 「A few / A little」句型
titleEn: Using a few and a little to express a small positive quantity

source.file: Sentence Structure 10 - 「A few : A little 句」.pdf
omissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Subject + verb + a few + plural countable noun + other information

formulas.labelZh: A few：放在複數可數名詞前
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + a few + plural countable noun + other information
There are + a few + plural countable noun + other information

formulas.labelZh: A little：放在不可數名詞前
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + a little + uncountable noun + other information
There is + a little + uncountable noun + other information

example: There are a few advantages of studying overseas.
exampleZh: 到海外讀書有幾個好處。

examples.en: There are a few advantages of studying overseas.
examples.zh: 到海外讀書有幾個好處。
examples.highlight: There are a few advantages of studying overseas.

examples.en: There is a little milk left in the fridge.
examples.zh: 雪櫃裏還剩下一點牛奶。
examples.highlight: There is a little milk left in the fridge.

rules.en: Use a few with plural nouns that can be counted individually.
rules.zh: a few 用於可以逐一數出的複數名詞。

rules.en: Use a little with uncountable nouns that generally cannot be counted individually.
rules.zh: a little 用於一般不能逐一數出的不可數名詞。

rules.en: A countable noun after a few must be plural.
rules.zh: a few 後面的可數名詞必須使用複數形式。

rules.en: Do not add -s to an uncountable noun.
rules.zh: 不要在不可數名詞後面加 -s。

rules.en: Both a few and a little mean that there is some quantity, although not much, and normally carry a positive meaning.
rules.zh: a few 和 a little 都表示「有一些，雖然數量不多」，通常帶有正面意思。

rules.en: This exercise uses only a few and a little. Do not omit a and use few or little instead, because the meaning changes.
rules.zh: 本練習只使用 a few 和 a little。不要省略 a 而改用 few 或 little，因為意思會有所不同。

benefits.en: These two structures let you state clearly that there is some quantity, but not much, without giving an exact number.
benefits.zh: 這兩個句型能讓你清楚表達「有一些，但數量不多」，而不需要說出確實數字。

benefits.en: They help you distinguish countable from uncountable nouns and reduce common errors such as a few water or a little books.
benefits.zh: 它們能幫助你分辨哪些名詞可以數，哪些名詞不可以直接逐一數，減少 a few water 或 a little books 一類常見錯誤。

benefits.en: After mastering these structures, you can describe quantities of time, money, food, people and objects more naturally and accurately.
benefits.zh: 掌握這兩個句型後，你描述時間、金錢、食物、人物和物件數量時，會更加自然和準確。

sourceOmissions: The Important Rules and Benefits explanations are provided in Chinese only; their English fields are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a few or a little while keeping the original meaning.
Use a few before a plural countable noun and a little before an uncountable noun.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 a few 或 a little 改寫以下句子，並保留原句意思。
在複數可數名詞前使用 a few，在不可數名詞前使用 a little。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: A small number of biscuits are on the plate.
questions.promptZh: 碟子上有少量餅乾。
questions.answer: There are a few biscuits on the plate.
questions.answerZh: 碟子上有幾塊餅乾。
questions.highlight: There are a few biscuits on the plate.

questions.prompt: Mia added a small amount of salt to the soup.
questions.promptZh: 米婭在湯裏加入了少量鹽。
questions.answer: Mia added a little salt to the soup.
questions.answerZh: 米婭在湯裏加入了一點鹽。
questions.highlight: Mia added a little salt to the soup.

questions.prompt: We have some time before the lesson starts, but not much.
questions.promptZh: 課堂開始前，我們還有一些時間，但不多。
questions.answer: We have a little time before the lesson starts.
questions.answerZh: 課堂開始前，我們還有一點時間。
questions.highlight: We have a little time before the lesson starts.

questions.prompt: There are some chairs near the window, but not many.
questions.promptZh: 窗邊有一些椅子，但數量不多。
questions.answer: There are a few chairs near the window.
questions.answerZh: 窗邊有幾張椅子。
questions.highlight: There are a few chairs near the window.

questions.highlight: Ben made a few mistakes in his homework.

questions.highlight: I need a little help with this box.
